title: AI 今日热点速览 2026-03-17
script:
今天 AI 圈最值得看的 5 条动态，我帮你压缩成 1 分钟。
第1条，[AINews] NVIDIA GTC: Jensen goes hard on OpenClaw, Vera CPU, and announces $1T sales backlog in 2027。核心点：It is NVIDIA GTC day again, and over his signature 2hr unrehearsed keynote , Je…
第2条，Bank built its own threat hunting agent because vendors can’t keep pace with new threats。核心点：AI helped send weekly threat signal count from 80 million to 400 billion, then…
第3条，QCon London 2026: Behind Booking.com's AI Evolution: The Unpolished Story。核心点：Jabez Eliezer Manuel, Senior Principal Engineer at Booking.com, presented “Behi…
第4条，Gartner suggests Friday afternoon Copilot ban because tired users may be too lazy to check its mistakes。核心点：Admins may be even more exhausted by then, because securing Microsoft’s AI help…
第5条，AI still doesn't work very well, businesses are faking it, and a reckoning is coming。核心点：Codestrap founders say we need to dial down the hype and sort through the mess…
如果你要，我可以把这份简报继续展开成长文、PPT 或者选题策划。
